vibe: Premium, trustworthy, international, elegant, high-end industrial.

brand.name: Alux Architectural
brand.message: High-quality architectural hardware for modern spaces.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-12 to p-24 for section padding to emphasize luxury. Use negative space aggressively.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Create asymmetry and visual tension.

components.navbar: Sticky crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10). High saturation if possible. Links should have subtle hover states (text-white).
components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary button: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#F3C844] transition-colors. Secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white/40.
components.cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px solid border (border-white/10). No soft shadows, rely on inner border contrast.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized for dark mode. Input: bg-transparent border-white/20 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37].

animations.global: Lenis smooth scroll is mandatory for a premium momentum feel. Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveals.
animations.hero: Slow scale-in for background image (ken burns effect). Staggered fade-up for H1 text.
animations.interactions: Hover states must have distinct contrast shifts. Cards subtly translate up (-translate-y-1) and borders shift to brass (border-[#D4AF37]/50).

hero_background.description: Sleek modern living room featuring dark tones and elegant furnishings with ambient lighting.

specific_sections.hero: Must use a gradient overlay on the hero image (`bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-black/10`) to ensure text contrast while letting the architectural image breathe. Do not use a flat overlay.
specific_sections.about_brand: Text-heavy but highly stylized. Highlight serving dealers, builders, architects. Use the 'Bento' Mode A grid.
specific_sections.why_choose_us: Cards displaying 'Durable Brass Quality', 'Precision Finishing', 'Bulk Orders'. Use a subtle 'Tracing Beam' border effect if possible, or extremely crisp 1px borders.
specific_sections.contact_section: Include form and dark-themed Google Maps iframe. Direct contact: WhatsApp, phone (9099369442), email (purnatpedhadiya2016@gmail.com).
specific_sections.whatsapp_float: Fixed bottom-right button. Use Lucide or Phosphor icon. Must have pulse animation or subtle glow.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient text-shadow or gradient backing.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='hero-explore-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup @studio-freight/lenis for smooth scrolling.
Import Playfair Display and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement layouts using raw Tailwind HTML for marketing sections (Hero, Galleries) to maintain structural freedom. Use Shadcn exclusively for the Contact Form.
Never center everything; embrace asymmetric grid layouts for an editorial feel.
Use exact image URLs provided. Do not use generic placeholders.
